rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH DIANE SCHENK VS. ELIZABETH JANE MCCARTHY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Of Defendants Elizabeth Mccarthy, Sheila Obrien, And Monica Mccarthy For The Determination Of A Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 11, 2024 line 1. Defendant's Motion for Determination of Good Faith Settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 11, 2024 line 3. Defendant Epic Real Estate Motion to Strike Amended Complaint is DENIED. The basis for recovery of attorney's fees and facts to support punitive damages are sufficiently stated. rulings.Case Title: OSCAR GONZALEZ VS. THEMISTOCLES CHILICAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 11, 2024 line 3. Defendant Chilicas Demurrer to Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to this defendant only as to the causes of action for breach of contract and violation of CC 1942.4. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for breach of warranty of habitability and breach of warranty of quiet enjoyment if Plaintiff can allege these causes of action sounding in tort, and not as implied contractual term breaches. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. The remaining causes of action are sufficiently stated. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 11, 2024 line 4. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. rulings.Case Title: 455 HYDE I3, LP VS. BRADLEY GUDZINAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 11, 2024 line 7. Defendant's Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record is OFF CALENDAR. Proof of Service on file indicates that Order Advancing the hearing date and setting the deadline for the opposition was served by regular mail on Thursday, September 5, 2024 with an opposition by client due by noon on Monday, September 9, 2024, i.e. 3.5 days (including the weekend) before opposition was due. This was not calculated to give reasonable notice to client. No Proof of Service for Plaintiff. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
